goal: Integrate the VPC module into dev and prod root modules and validate the configuration
summary: Phase 1 complete: VPC module wired into dev and prod root modules, environment-specific terraform.tfvars populated with CIDRs and AZs from docs/technical-spec.md, and both environments pass terraform fmt and terraform validate.
stepSummaries:
1. Update terraform/environments/dev/main.tf to call the vpc module and pass dev-specific inputs [verified]
  2. Create terraform/environments/dev/terraform.tfvars with dev VPC CIDR, public subnets, and AZs [verified]
  3. Update terraform/environments/prod/main.tf to call the vpc module and pass prod-specific inputs [verified]
  4. Create terraform/environments/prod/terraform.tfvars with prod VPC CIDR, public subnets, and AZs [verified]
  5. Run terraform fmt -recursive -check terraform/ [verified]
  6. Run terraform validate in dev [verified]
  7. Run terraform validate in prod [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Real verification executed: terraform fmt -recursive -check passed; terraform init and validate passed in both dev and prod.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 5: terraform fmt check passed. Step 6: dev terraform validate exit code 0. Step 7: prod terraform validate exit code 0.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal met: both environment root modules call the VPC module, tfvars contain correct values, and validation succeeds.
gateVerdicts.evidence: dev/main.tf and prod/main.tf call module vpc from ../../modules/vpc; dev/prod terraform.tfvars contain correct CIDRs/AZs; validate passed in both environments.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred; all planned work completed.
